summary: Cloudmersive exposes multiple HTTPS REST APIs (Virus Scan, Security Threat Detection, Convert, OCR, Validate, Spam Detection, Phishing Detection, DLP, and Fraud Detection) authenticated by a Cloudmersive API key sent in the `Apikey` header, plus an MCP server at `https://cloudmersive.com/mcp-server` that uses an API key in the `api-key` header.
